decision_audit.interpretation: behavioral vocabulary-feature readout, not hidden prose, chain of thought, or a replacement Jacobian-lens fit

next_step: treat sensitivity as descriptive and collect strict numerical coverage

bootstrap.interval_interpretation: conditional on the frozen nested-crossfit predictions; excludes model-fit uncertainty

model.class_weight: balanced from the current training split only
model.objective_normalization: sum class-balanced negative log likelihood plus L2(weights)/(2*C); intercept is unpenalized
model.solver_preconditioning: diagonal curvature-reference scaling of weight and intercept search coordinates; require the unchanged gradient tolerance in original W/intercept coordinates

majority_baseline.definition: empirical class prior over the complete outer training fold

posthoc_descriptive_checkpoint_ordinal_p.definition: empirical action-class distribution at the same checkpoint ordinal in the outer training repositories; empirical global outer-training prior when that ordinal is absent
posthoc_descriptive_checkpoint_ordinal_p.reason_added: action-label checkpoint-ordinal distribution inspected after the frozen primary comparison protocol
